title: Throwback Thursday: Yoga Cats
excerpt: Here’s a little #ThrowbackThursday for you featuring my #Yoga #Cats! #TBT
content: Whenever I roll out the yoga mat, the cats think it’s for them. I don’t stand a chance! Even when Mabel was a kitten, she wanted in on whatever I was doing. How could I say no to those sweet faces!?
